segments.text: Preserve me, O God, for in You I put my trust.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O my soul, you have said to the Lord,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You are my Lord, My goodness is nothing apart from You.
segments.speaker: David's Soul

segments.text: As for the saints who are on the earth,
They are the excellent ones, in whom is all my delight.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Their sorrows shall be multiplied who hasten after another god;
Their drink offerings of blood I will not offer, Nor take up their names on my lips.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O Lord, You are the portion of my inheritance and my cup; You maintain my lot.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: The lines have fallen to me in pleasant places; Yes, I have a good inheritance.
I will bless the Lord who has given me counsel; My heart also instructs me in the night seasons.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I have set the Lord always before me; Because He is at my right hand I shall not be moved.
Therefore my heart is glad, and my glory rejoices; My flesh also will rest in hope.
For You will not leave my soul in Sheol, Nor will You allow Your Holy One to see corruption.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You will show me the path of life; In Your presence is fullness of joy; At Your right hand are pleasures forevermore.
segments.speaker: David
